name: Apteva Apps
description: Curated registry of Apteva Apps. Each entry points at a manifest URL the platform can fetch + install.

apps.name: simple
apps.description: Read-only kiosk view of an Apteva agent — for client-facing deployments. Same-origin, path-mounted SPA; no sidecar.
apps.author: Apteva

apps.name: tasks
apps.description: Mission board for an Apteva instance. Agents create and complete tasks via MCP tools; the dashboard tracks progress live.
apps.author: Apteva

apps.name: status
apps.description: Per-instance status line. Agent writes 'what I'm on right now' via MCP; dashboard reads it live. Short-horizon counterpart to the long-lived directive.
apps.author: Apteva

apps.name: channelchat
apps.description: Chat bridge between the agent and the dashboard / external channels. Persists messages with monotonic ids for clean reconnect.
apps.author: Apteva
